attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
   ITEM_ID
,TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(ITEM_NAME,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '))
,REPLACE(REPLACE(ITEM_DESCRIPTION,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ')
,BUSINESS_UNIT
,PRODUCT_FAMILY
,LINE_OF_BUSINESS
,FCS_DATE
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,ITEM_TYPE
,ITEM_STATUS
,SOURCE
,ERP_SPECIFIC
,PT_CC
,REPLACE(REQUESTOR,CHR(13),' ')
,REQUESTED_DATE
,MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG
,PRODUCT_FAMILY_DESCRIPTION
,BRAND_NAME
,ITEM_APPROVER
,ITEM_APPROVED_DATE
,SOFTWARE_CATEGORY
,BASE_PID
,ITEM_FLAG
,INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE
,BATCH_ID
,OVERRIDE_FLAG
,AUDITOR_COMMENTS
,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
,GENUINE_MISMATCH
,CREATED_BY
,CREATED_DATE
,MODIFIED_BY
,MODIFIED_DATE
,DEACTIVATED_BY
,DEACTIVATED_DATE
,USER_INTERFACE
,CUSTOM_KIT_FLAG
,NAFTA_FLAG
,GPL_FLAG
,PID_STATUS
,AUDIT_FLAG
,MANUAL_IMP_FLAG
,KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG
,DASHBOARD_FLAG
,WORKBENCH_FLAG
,REASON
,REMOVED_DATE
,DELIVERY_OPTION
,ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
  FROM  CUBE.XXCFI_CB_ITEMS
  WHERE MODIFIED_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
